title: hesperis berlandieri
intro: Hesperis berlandieri, also known as the evening primrose or evening star, is a perennial plant belonging to the Brassicaceae family. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its high concentration of gamma-linolenic acid (GLA), an essential fatty acid that has anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Hesperis berlandieri include reducing inflammation, improving skin health, and supporting cardiovascular health. Herbal preparations of Hesperis berlandieri include capsules, tinctures, and teas, which can be used to support overall well-being and alleviate symptoms of various health conditions.
